results.title: Weekly Career Horoscope, July 19 to July 25, 2026: Success, challenges, and breakthroughs; Know about your Career
results.description: Professional opportunities are emerging for many zodiac signs this week. Steady efforts will lead to recognition and new responsibilities for some. Past connections may resurface, offering unexpected career advancements and growth. Your unique ideas and consistent performance will attract significant attention. Trusting your instincts and staying curious will unlock future potential.

results.title: Mr Marvis accelerates growth strategy with additional investors
results.description: Mr Marvis’s international expansion continues to gain momentum. The Amsterdam-based menswear brand, founded in 2016, which most recently opened a store in Düsseldorf, has announced a strategic investment by its...
